title: Proxy Authorisation
description: Authorises a proxy to act on behalf of a testator — information gathering, communication, negotiation, or full decision-making. Includes consent record with cultural consent methods.

ConsentRecord.description: Record of the testator's consent to proxy authorisation. Supports formal, informal, and culturally appropriate consent methods.

consentGiven.description: Whether the testator has given consent for the proxy to act on their behalf.

consentMethod.$comment: in_person_verbal: verbal consent given face to face. in_person_written: written consent signed in person. video_recorded: consent recorded via video. witnessed_verbal: verbal consent in the presence of witnesses. phone_recorded: consent given and recorded over the telephone. assumed_cultural_norm: consent assumed under cultural norms where explicit consent is not customary (e.g. eldest son acts for the family). Use with caution — document the cultural basis.
consentMethod.description: The method by which consent was obtained.

witnesses.description: Witnesses to the consent, if any.

personId.description: Reference to the Person.id of the witness.

role.description: The role or capacity in which the person witnessed the consent.

witnessedDate.description: Date this person witnessed the consent.

documentRef.description: Reference to a document recording the consent.

examples: Consent given in the presence of solicitor and two family elders

id.description: Unique identifier for this proxy authorisation within the INHERIT document.

proxyPersonId.description: Reference to the Person.id of the authorised proxy.

testatorPersonId.description: Reference to the Person.id of the testator granting the authorisation.

scope.$comment: full: proxy may act in all capacities. information_gathering: proxy may only gather information about the estate. communication: proxy may communicate with professionals and family on the testator's behalf. negotiation: proxy may negotiate with dealers, professionals, and other parties. decision_making: proxy may make binding decisions on the testator's behalf.
scope.description: The scope of authority granted to the proxy.

consentRecord.description: Record of the testator's consent to this proxy authorisation.

dealerNegotiationPermitted.description: Whether the proxy is specifically authorised to negotiate with dealers and third parties interested in estate assets.

startDate.description: Date from which the proxy authorisation is effective.

expiryDate.description: Date on which the proxy authorisation expires, if time-limited.

revocationDate.description: Date the proxy authorisation was revoked by the testator, if applicable.

auditTrailEnabled.description: Whether all actions taken by the proxy should be logged for audit purposes.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this proxy authorisation.
examples: Proxy is testator's daughter — authorised to liaise with Bonhams regarding the art collection
Revoked after family disagreement — replaced by new proxy authorisation
